bill.title: Artificial Intelligence Safety and Transparency Act
bill.mockText: To establish federal artificial intelligence risk management standards, transparency reporting, and safety evaluations for high-impact AI systems.

latestAction.text: Referred to the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology.

committees.name: House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology

bill.title: Rural Broadband Infrastructure Improvement Act
bill.mockText: To provide grants for rural broadband deployment and telecommunications infrastructure upgrades.

latestAction.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation.
